go_runtime_scope: local/copied-DB-and-files attachment text JSON plus raw/binary serving candidate only
parity_scope: text JSON response remains available for text attachments
raw=true streams text attachments with explicit text MIME
raw=true streams binary image attachments with detected extension MIME
Range requests are delegated to http.ServeContent and return partial bytes
missing attachment id returns Python-compatible 404 JSON
missing file on disk returns File not found on disk
unsafe paths, symlink escapes, unsupported extensions, and oversized files are fail-closed as File not found on disk
default Go runtime keeps raw attachment serving disabled

allowed_next_step.reason: Raw attachment serving is closed as a local/copied-files candidate; the next Go-primary files surface is multipart image upload.
